org.docgene.model

Class XMLDoxygenAPI

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractLink
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractAPI
        • org.docgene.model.XMLDoxygenAPI
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ElementReference, ExternalLink, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLDoxygenAPI
extends AbstractAPI
    Represent an link to a Doxygen API.

      A link to an attribute.
